name: Softr No-Code Portal Builder API
what_it_does: No-code client portal and internal tool builder with API — built specifically for creating membership sites, client portals, and internal apps on top of Airtable, Google Sheets, or HubSpot data, with user authentication and access control.
use_cases: Building client portals with user authentication on top of Airtable databases
Creating membership sites with gated content driven by Airtable data
Managing Softr app users and permissions programmatically via API
Syncing user data between external systems and Softr user management
Building internal dashboards with role-based access on Airtable or Sheets data
not_for: Complex custom application logic (use Retool or custom code)
Apps requiring complex real-time data or websockets
best_when: A non-technical team needs to build client portals or member-only apps on top of existing Airtable or Google Sheets data with zero code.
avoid_when: You need complex business logic, custom UI interactions, or high-performance real-time data.

auth.notes: API key from Softr account settings. Bearer token authentication. App-scoped access. Webhook support for user events. User management API for adding/removing Softr app users.

pricing.paid_tiers: Basic from $49/month; Professional from $99; Business from $199; Enterprise custom
pricing.notes: Per-app pricing. User count limits on lower plans. Strong Airtable ecosystem partnership. Good for agencies building client portals. Growing features including payment integration.

performance.rate_limits: API rate limits per plan; user limits affect app capacity

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API focused on user management (add, update, remove app users). Webhook support for user events. Data operations go through underlying Airtable/Sheets directly. Limited API surface — primarily user management.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: User addition and update operations are upsert-style. Read operations idempotent. User removal idempotent — removing non-existent user is safe.
known_agent_gotchas: API primarily manages Softr users, not the underlying data (use Airtable API for data)
User limits on lower plans — agents adding users may hit plan limits
Authentication built into Softr — external auth requires enterprise plan
Portal logic configured in UI — agents interact with user management only

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. API key auth. GDPR compliant. EU and US data residency. User authentication handled by Softr — review auth security for client-facing portals.
